name: @elvis1513/auto-coding-skill
description: CLI installer for a generic .agents engineering workflow with optional CI/Jenkins and target-environment verification.

scripts.test: node -c cli/src/index.js && node -c cli/src/sync-assets.js && python3 -c "import ast, pathlib; files = ['src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/ap.py', 'src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/core.py', 'src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/http_checks.py', 'cli/assets/skill/scripts/ap.py', 'cli/assets/skill/scripts/core.py', 'cli/assets/skill/scripts/http_checks.py']; [ast.parse(pathlib.Path(rel).read_text(encoding='utf-8'), filename=rel, feature_version=(3, 11)) for rel in files]; print('python311-grammar-ok')" && python3 -m py_compile src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/ap.py src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/core.py src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/http_checks.py cli/assets/skill/scripts/ap.py cli/assets/skill/scripts/core.py cli/assets/skill/scripts/http_checks.py && python3 -c "import pathlib, tomllib; files = sorted(pathlib.Path('src/agents').glob('*.toml')) + sorted(pathlib.Path('cli/assets/agents').glob('*.toml')); [tomllib.loads(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) for path in files]; print('agent-toml-ok')" && npm run check:assets && find src cli -type d -name '__pycache__' -prune -exec rm -rf {} +
scripts.release:check: npm run sync-assets && npm run test && npm pack --dry-run
